University of Maryland -----------------Robert H. Smith School of Business------------------ Marketing (0503M) Curriculum Checklist

1. General Education (D- or higher (except ENGL101), regular grading option)

4. Smith School Upper Level Core (effective Spring 2014)

a. Fundamental Studies

(C- or higher, regular grading option)

____ BMGT350 Marketing Principles (3)

** Oral Communication (satisfied by COMM100/107/200 below)
